title: delphinium fissum subsp. sordidum
intro: Delphinium fissum subsp. sordidum, commonly known as the Sordid Delphinium or Sordid Larkspur, is a flowering plant species belonging to the delphinium genus. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing pain and inflammation, and supporting digestive health. Delphinium fissum subsp. sordidum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for medicinal purposes.
